title: potentilla × gardneriana
intro: Potentilla × gardneriana, also known as the garden cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Potentilla, derived from the cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla norwegica. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla × gardneriana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in topical applications, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
